item.title: Build OHT-26001
item.description:
Handmade Esquire-style electric guitar built in 2026.

The BeachCaster is a stripped-back, player-focused instrument designed around simplicity, feel, and tone. Lightweight cypress body paired with a Pau Marfim neck and fingerboard gives a fast, comfortable feel with excellent clarity and snap.

Finished in a satin Osmo oil for a natural, broken-in feel that will age beautifully with play.

item.title: Build OHT-26002
item.description:
Description

Handmade Esquire-style electric guitar built in 2026.

The BeachCaster is a stripped-back, player-focused instrument designed around simplicity, feel, and tone. A fantastic guitar featuring a solid reclaimed Oregon Pine body from an old workbench paired with a Pau Marfim neck and fingerboard gives a fast, comfortable feel with excellent clarity and snap.

Finished in a satin Osmo oil for a natural, broken-in feel that will age beautifully with play.

item.title: Repairs & Setups
item.description:
Based in Cape St Francis, I offer repair and setup services for electric and bass guitars. All work is done by hand with the same attention to detail that goes into every Hartsuiker build.

Setups

A good setup makes a huge difference to playability. All setups include neck relief adjustment, action, intonation, and nut slot check.

Service Price
Electric guitar setup R450
Bass guitar setup R500
Setup + restring R550

Fretwork

Service Price
Fret level, crown & polish R800
Partial refret (per fret) R120
Full refret — electric R1,800
Full refret — bass R2,200

Electronics

Service Price
Pickup installation R350 + parts
Rewire (standard) R450 + parts
Jack replacement R200 + parts
Pot replacement R150 per pot + parts

Structural & Other

Service Price
Nut replacement R400 + parts
Broken headstock repair POA
General repairs POA

Notes

  • Parts are charged at cost
  • Quotes are free and without obligation
  • Drop-off by arrangement in Cape St Francis
  • Courier welcome — contact me before sending

Contact

hartsuikerguitar@gmail.com
066 498 6343

item.title: Spiral Bass
item.description:
Description Looking for a bass with incredible character? This custom-built bass features a striking, highly figured “swirly” grain pattern that stands out on any stage. Built by hand with a focus on natural beauty and solid, punchy tone.

A custom solid-body bass featuring hand-carved ergonomic scrolls, a multi-laminate neck, and a split-coil configuration. Made entirely from reclaimed wood with a natural shellac finish. Message me for full details, pricing, or to come try it out.
